purpose: Fresh live provider smoke after OpenRouter and REG.RU mail credentials were supplied in local ignored env.
secretsPolicy: Secret values were loaded from .env.local/user env and were not written to this evidence file.

imap.readback: No reset email was found after a fresh send, 30 second wait, and all-folder IMAP scan.

pop3.readback: POP3 mailbox had zero messages after the fresh SMTP-accepted send.

coverageImpact.RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE: Narrows real-provider risk: OpenRouter key/model are live and provider call succeeds. Full browser SSE proposal/apply traversal remains open.
coverageImpact.RISK-AUTH-EMAIL-RESET-HAPPY-PATH: Narrows external mail risk: SMTP provider path accepted a reset email send, but mailbox delivery/extraction did not pass; full reset via email remains open.
